go-task-runner.summary: A CLI tool to run JSON-defined tasks with simple interval scheduling, designed for small homelab workflows.
facts: It simplifies the execution of repetitive tasks and provides a simple way to manage them with interval scheduling.
Go-based backend for scheduling and logging
go-task-runner.role: Contributed 30% of the codebase, adding 120 lines across 7 files over 7 active days.

personal-portfolio-site.summary: A lightweight static portfolio site that highlights projects, skills, and coursework.
facts: Users can easily view and learn about the projects, skills, and coursework of the portfolio owner.
Displaying projects with a grid layout
Using JavaScript to dynamically render projects and skills
Implementing a CTA that scrolls to the projects section

sensor-fleet-backend.summary: A web API service for ingesting IoT sensor readings with in-memory storage and health checks.
facts: It provides a simple and efficient way to manage and analyze sensor data, enabling users to track sensor health and detect anomalies.
FastAPI framework for building the web API
sensor-fleet-backend.role: Contributed 43% of the codebase, adding 96 lines across 7 files over 10 active days.

infra-terraform.summary: Terraform configuration for a small app stack, including VPC, subnets, and an app module with S3 logging bucket, designed for study/demo environments.
facts: This project provides a structured way to manage infrastructure using Terraform, which is beneficial for developers and IT professionals who need to quickly set up and manage cloud resources.
Terraform modules for VPC, subnets, and app stack
Use of tfvars for configuration management

algorithms-toolkit.summary: A Python CLI tool for performing common algorithms like BFS, DFS, binary search, and sorting on small datasets.
facts: It helps software developers and interviewers quickly test and verify their algorithm implementations.
The project uses Python's built-in argparse module for command-line argument parsing.
The load_graph function reads a graph from a file and returns it as a dictionary.
algorithms-toolkit.role: Sole developer, adding 162 lines across 8 files over 18 active days.

java-chat-service.summary: A tiny HTTP chat service using Java's built-in HttpServer to store and retrieve messages in memory.
facts: Provides a simple, lightweight chat service for users to communicate with each other.
Exposes RESTful endpoints for health checks, message retrieval, and sending new messages
Supports JSON format for message retrieval
Uses Java's built-in HttpServer for handling HTTP requests
Stores messages in a synchronized list to ensure thread safety
java-chat-service.role: Contributed 30% of the codebase, adding 130 lines across 5 files over 7 active days.

campus-navigation-api.summary: A TypeScript Express API for campus pathfinding and schedule-aware routing, providing endpoints for health, building listings, and shortest-path calculations.
facts: This API helps students and faculty navigate the campus efficiently, providing real-time information on building locations and routes.
TypeScript and Express for robust and maintainable code
Graph data structure for efficient pathfinding

ml-lab-notebooks.summary: A library of machine learning experiments and utilities for data analysis and regression tasks.
facts: Provides a collection of tools for data preprocessing, model training, and evaluation, which can be used by data scientists and analysts.
Linear regression and logistic regression experiments
Data cleaning utilities for normalization and feature extraction
Uses Python and popular machine learning libraries like NumPy, Pandas, and Scikit-learn
Includes a variety of experiments and utilities for different machine learning tasks
